_doc: Hand-maintained matcher overrides (wq-039 §2.4). Resolution order: overrides → generated → legacy. Bare aliases here trump anything generated from entities.json.

entity_aliases._doc: { slug: [extra alias strings] } — appended to the generated entity rule. Useful when entity names contain parentheticals, the slug is too short, or the entity goes by multiple names in source text.

field_synonyms._doc: { field_id: [extra synonym strings] } — appended to the generated field rule. Order doesn't matter; the longest-first sort happens at generation time.
market_share_pct: share of new ai tool spending
